name: Dak's Orange-Raisin Wheat Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons fresh orange juice plus 2 tbsp orange juice concentrate
2 tablespoons orange juice concentrate and 1 cup warm water
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all the ingredients into the bread machine in the order listed: yeast, whole wheat flour, salt, raisins, orange juice (and orange juice concentrate if using), and egg whites.
2. Select "whole wheat" setting on the bread machine.
3. Push "start" to begin baking the bread.
